metadata.description: Personal Claude Code commands and utilities. Copy formatting, X posting and reading, and more.

plugins.name: copy
plugins.description: Format and copy Claude output to clipboard for Slack, Email, Google Chat, Google Docs, or Jira.

plugins.name: setup-pulse
plugins.description: Install claude-pulse statusline for real-time token usage monitoring.

plugins.name: x
plugins.description: Post and read tweets on X (Twitter) from Claude Code. /x:tweet drafts, previews, and posts (single, threads, replies). /x:read fetches a tweet by URL or ID into context.

plugins.name: skill-reviewer
plugins.description: Evaluate any skill's design quality against best practices (based on https://x.com/trq212/status/2033949937936085378). Scores 10 dimensions (29-point rubric), detects anti-patterns, and optionally applies safe fixes.

plugins.name: find-session
plugins.description: Search past Claude Code conversations by keyword and get session IDs for claude --resume.

plugins.name: claude-reviewer
plugins.description: Review any project's .claude/ folder setup against best practices (based on https://x.com/akshay_pachaar/status/2035341800739877091). Scores 8 dimensions (24-point rubric) covering CLAUDE.md quality, permissions, rules, commands, skills, agents, git hygiene, and progressive disclosure.

plugins.name: coacher
plugins.description: Primes Claude with a peer-collaborator frame at SessionStart (based on Amanda Askell's prompting philosophy via https://x.com/itsolelehmann/status/2045578185950040390). Provides /coacher:status, /coacher:audit, /coacher:reset, and /coacher:rant for mid-session integrity checks, CLAUDE.md conflict detection, re-anchoring, and raw-vent-to-productive translation.
